mapper.select: SELECT login_id, password, name, email, role, status, refresh_token, created_at, updated_at FROM member WHERE login_id = #{loginId}
SELECT login_id, password, name, email, role, status, refresh_token, created_at, updated_at FROM member WHERE refresh_token = #{refreshToken}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member ( login_id, password, name, email, role, status, refresh_token, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{loginId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{email}, #{role}, #{status}, #{refreshToken}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET refresh_token = #{refreshToken}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE login_id = #{loginId}
